name: Dfplayer → Play Mp3
description: Plays a track inside the folder `mp3`. Files inside the folder must be numbered from 1 to 9999, like `0001.mp3`, `0002.mp3`, ... etc. The folder name needs to be `mp3`, placed under the SD card root directory, and the mp3 file name needs to be 4 digits, for example, "0001.mp3", placed under the mp3 folder. If you want, you can add additional text after the number in the filename, for example, `0001hello.mp3`, but must always be referenced by number only in yaml.

config_entries.label: File
config_entries.description: The file number inside the `mp3` folder to play.
